title: Audience Builder
description: Interactive wizard for defining audience segments using criteria-based filters and ICP configuration. Build targeted buyer personas with multi-step guided workflows.

title: Filters Refactor RD1
description: Round 1 redesign of the BI filtering UI exploring new interaction patterns and improved discoverability. Tests simplified filter composition and real-time preview.

title: Filters Refactor RD2
description: Round 2 iteration of the BI filter redesign with refined UX based on RD1 feedback. Enhanced performance and streamlined filter application workflow.

title: Hot Prospects Brief
description: SDR-ready ranked list of high-intent companies with ICP fit scoring. 5 persona views.

title: Hot Prospects Brief v2
description: Unified card design with rich 'why call' rationale. 5 personas, summary stats, quick filter presets.
